decks.notes: The main idea of this deck is to utilize enchantments in order to create a powerful combo that can overwhelm the opponent. By using cards like Opalescence, Parallax Wave, and Replenish, the deck can generate a strong board presence that can be difficult to deal with. The deck also focuses on card draw and protection with cards like Mirri's Guile, Sterling Grove, and Solitary Confinement. With the ability to ramp with Serra's Sanctum and Argothian Enchantress, this deck aims to quickly establish control and win the game through a powerful enchantress combo.

The main idea of this deck is to control the game by using cards like Oath of Druids to cheat out powerful creatures like Terravore. The deck also utilizes control elements such as Swords to Plowshares and Sphere of Resistance to disrupt the opponent's game plan. With land destruction cards like Wasteland and Thermokarst, the deck aims to slow down the opponent and gain advantage. The deck also includes some card advantage engines like Sylvan Library to help maintain control over the game.

The main concept of this deck is to utilize enchantress cards to draw cards whenever you play an enchantment spell. By combining cards like Enchantress's Presence and Mirri's Guile with enchantments like Opalescence and Parallax Wave, you can create a powerful combo that generates card advantage and allows you to control the game. The deck also includes mana ramp with Wild Growth and Serra's Sanctum, as well as removal options like Swords to Plowshares and Seal of Cleansing. With the ability to draw cards and control the board, this deck aims to overwhelm opponents with its enchantress synergy.

The main focus of this deck is to quickly assemble the Phyrexian Dreadnought combo by using cards like Portent and Opt to dig through the deck and find the pieces needed. Stifle is used to protect the combo from removal spells, while also disrupting the opponent's game plan. The deck also includes counterspells and other interactive cards to control the game until the combo can be assembled. The goal is to overwhelm the opponent with a large creature early in the game and secure a victory.

The main focus of this deck is to control the game by utilizing counterspells, removal spells, and card advantage. The deck aims to stabilize the board with threats like Mishra's Factory and Faerie Conclave while keeping the opponent's resources in check with cards like Standstill and Dust Bowl. By efficiently using counterspells and removal, the deck can outlast its opponents and eventually close out the game with finishers like Decree of Justice and Exalted Angel. Overall, the deck seeks to maintain control and outvalue the opponent in a slow and methodical manner.

The main idea of this deck is to quickly fill the graveyard with powerful creatures using cards like Putrid Imp and Dark Ritual, then reanimate them with spells like Reanimate and Exhume. The deck also includes cards like Cabal Therapy and Unmask to disrupt the opponent's strategy and protect your combo. Akroma, Angel of Wrath and other high-impact creatures are used to quickly close out the game once reanimated. The deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with powerful creatures and win the game before they can respond effectively.

The deck focuses on quickly playing out low-cost aggressive creatures and burn spells to deal damage to the opponent as fast as possible. It aims to control the board with removal spells like Incinerate and Lightning Bolt while utilizing efficient creatures like Jackal Pup and Quirion Dryad to apply pressure. Cards like Call of the Herd and Rancor provide additional threats, and cards like Sylvan Library help with card advantage. Overall, the deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with a fast and efficient offensive strategy.

The primary focus of this deck is to quickly assemble the Phyrexian Dreadnought combo by pairing it with Stifle to prevent the sacrifice trigger. The deck also includes a strong counterspell package to protect the combo and control the opponent's plays. Card selection and draw spells help to ensure consistency and find the necessary pieces to execute the combo efficiently. The overall strategy revolves around combining the Dreadnought with Stifle while disrupting the opponent's game plan with countermagic.

The main idea of this RG Aggro deck is to overwhelm the opponent with aggressive creatures and efficient removal spells. The key strategy involves using cards like Wild Mongrel and Grim Lavamancer to quickly establish board presence, while also using Survival of the Fittest to search for key creatures like Deranged Hermit or Arrogant Wurm. The deck aims to maintain pressure on the opponent while disrupting their game plan with cards like Lightning Bolt and Naturalize. By combining strong creatures with removal and disruption, the deck aims to win the game quickly and decisively.

The main focus of this deck is to quickly assemble the Phyrexian Dreadnought combo with cards like Stifle and Vision Charm. The deck aims to disrupt opponents with counterspells while searching for the necessary combo pieces with cantrips like Opt and Portent. With efficient card draw and disruption tools such as Misdirection and Thwart, the deck seeks to control the game until it can successfully play Phyrexian Dreadnought and win the game in one swift move.

The deck focuses on quickly assembling the Phyrexian Dreadnought and Stifle combo to create a powerful threat on the board. It utilizes countermagic and card filtering to protect the combo and disrupt the opponent's game plan. The deck aims to control the game by efficiently countering spells and manipulating the opponent's topdeck with cards like Vision Charm and Portent. The inclusion of cards like Misdirection and Daze adds additional flexibility and disruption to the overall strategy. Overall, the deck seeks to win through a fast and resilient combo while disrupting the opponent's plans.

This deck focuses on utilizing low-cost aggressive creatures and disruptive spells to quickly overwhelm the opponent and control the game. By combining early creature pressure with hand disruption and removal spells, Mono Black Aggro aims to disrupt the opponent's game plan while steadily chipping away at their life total. The deck also includes graveyard hate and card draw to maintain its aggression and keep up the pressure on the opponent, resulting in a fast-paced and efficient playstyle that seeks to end the game quickly.

The main focus of this deck is to quickly and efficiently bring out Phyrexian Dreadnought, using various card draw and counter spells to protect the combo. Stifle is a key card in this deck, allowing players to disrupt opponents' strategies and protect their own combo from being countered or removed. The deck aims to control the game with counterspells while setting up the Dreadnought combo for a fast win. The inclusion of cards like Gush and Vision Charm helps to ensure the deck has the necessary resources to execute its game plan effectively.

The main focus of this deck is to overwhelm the opponent with aggressive creatures like Hypnotic Specter and Nantuko Shade while disrupting their hand with cards like Duress and Cabal Therapy. The deck also has removal spells like Snuff Out and Diabolic Edict to deal with threats from the opponent. Mishra's Factory provides additional creature power, while cards like Cursed Scroll and Wasteland add versatility to the deck. Overall, the key concept is to maintain pressure on the opponent through a combination of aggression and disruption.

The main focus of this deck is to quickly and efficiently play Phyrexian Dreadnought and use Stifle effects to counter any potential drawbacks, allowing for a powerful combo to be achieved. The deck includes various card draw and manipulation spells to help find the necessary pieces, along with Counterspells and disruption to protect the combo. Overall, the deck aims to disrupt opponents while assembling its own game-winning combo as quickly as possible.

The main concept of this deck is to quickly set up a combo using Ill-Gotten Gains to return key cards from the graveyard, such as Lion's Eye Diamond and Brain Freeze, allowing for a game-winning Brain Freeze finish. The deck utilizes cards like Intuition and Dark Ritual to quickly set up the combo, while also including cards like Tormod's Crypt and Chain of Vapor to disrupt opponents. The deck aims to be fast and efficient in executing its combo while managing resources effectively.
